## edu-cli paper past list

List past papers

```
edu-cli paper past list [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --code-id uint       Filter by paper code ID
  -h, --help               help for list
      --page int           Page number (default 1)
      --page-size int      Page size (default 20)
      --series-id uint     Filter by paper series ID
      --syllabus-id uint   Filter by syllabus ID
      --year int           Filter by year
```
